hypothesis: If GFN1-xTB semi-empirical band gaps are used as a baseline within a ∆-learning framework combined with structural descriptors and gradient boosting, then the resulting model will predict DFT-level (PBE and HSE06) band gaps for metal-organic frameworks more accurately than direct machine learning models trained solely on structural descriptors, because the semi-empirical method captures the underlying physics of electronic structure and the residual errors are more learnable patterns than the full band gap values themselves.
